name: @aipehub/example-personal-research-hub
description: Personal research/knowledge hub — Karpathy's LLM knowledge-base loop as an AipeHub case: a librarian router dispatches a compiler agent (raw source → compiled wiki note with backlinks, 'LLM as compiler') and a researcher agent (ask-your-wiki: search the notes → synthesize an answer → file it back). Real markdown file I/O; deterministic, no API key.
